title: Heptapleurum obtusifolium
taxonomy: Heptapleurum obtusifolium is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It belongs to the genus Heptapleurum, which is a part of the larger order Apiales. The classification of Heptapleurum obtusifolium is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - angiosperms, clade - eudicots, order - Apiales, family - Araliaceae, genus - Heptapleurum, species - H. obtusifolium. This plant is native to New Caledonia and is a member of the tropical and subtropical flora. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the system of classification used.
